Svelte – Unifi motion → Unifi wireless → Unifi relay into Savant
notes: Goal: Get motion detection at a location with NO local power into the Savant system as a dry-contact trigger, using an Ajax wireless hop. Key catch: Faradite Motion Sensor 360 "Volt Free" still needs 5–35V DC to power the sensor; "volt free" only refers to output contact. Option A: Ajax MotionProtect + Hub + Relay into Savant. Option B: keep Faradite with local LV PSU + Ajax Transmitter + Hub + Relay.

name: Access control
notes: This is a very common UniFi Access gotcha. Door access permissions do not equal UI visibility permissions. In UniFi Access, roles control what doors a user can unlock, but they do NOT automatically restrict what the user can see in the interface. Fix: adjust User Permissions at UniFi OS / Access App level.
